title: Operator Review Packet / Golden Walkthrough
what_changed: Added a narrative operator review packet for the existing latest preview.
Added a golden walkthrough describing the recommended operator read order.
Added a visual QA matrix that packages preserved regression expectations.
Added a no-real-execution attestation specific to the v17 documentation pass.
what_did_not_change: No new runtime, network or product integration path was introduced.
No new phase or transition was created.
preserved_prior_behavior: v4 six-layer decision hierarchy on Hoje
v5 light and dark themes with local persistence
v8 focused-day mobile navigation in Disponibilidade
v10 Help search, filter and FAQ behavior
v11 financial consistency between Hoje and Estimativa
v14 Dia versus Semana semantic split
v16 progressive disclosure and evidence preservation
validation_plan: json parsing for all new v17 artifacts
headless local load of the latest preview
